title: Daggers
description: Have you ever wanted daggers to be in the game, well this mod adds that!
body:
# Daggers
Have you ever wanted daggers to be in the game, well this mod adds that!
They do less damage than normal swords but have faster attack speed.

### What this mod adds
- Items
  - Wooden Dagger
  - Stone Dagger
  - Iron Dagger
  - Golden Dagger
  - Diamond Dagger
  - Netherite Dagger
